parameters.name: tagRegion
parameters.label: Tag Region
parameters.helpText: Provide region where Data Catalog tag template is created

parameters.name: datasetId
parameters.label: Dataset ID
parameters.helpText: Provide thee Dataset ID of BigQuery

parameters.name: table
parameters.label: Table
parameters.helpText: Provide BigQuery Table, need to be scanned

parameters.name: maxLimit
parameters.label: Max Limit
parameters.helpText: Provide the max limit we can query Big Query data

parameters.name: infoTypes
parameters.label: Info Types
parameters.helpText: Provide info type fields seperated by '/' i.e. PHONE_NUMBER/EMAIL_ADDRESS/CREDIT_CARD_NUMBER

parameters.name: tagTemplateId
parameters.label: Tag Template ID
parameters.helpText: Provide Data Catalog Tag Template ID

parameters.name: tagTemplateDisplayName
parameters.label: Tag Template DisplayName
parameters.helpText: Provide Data Catalog Tag Template Display name
